svg.title: Stage 8 — Per-Thread Logging Architecture
svg.desc: Diagram showing how each application thread writes compact log records into a per-thread SPSC queue, which a dedicated I/O thread then drains, formats, and flushes to disk or a network sink.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the application thread write into the SPSC queue?')

g.text: RDTSC ts · msg_id · raw numeric fields
